rationale: Educ. Code §39.003 governs special investigations of school districts by the commissioner. It contains no provisions related to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 39.003. SPECIAL INVESTIGATIONS. (a) The commissioner may authorize special investigations to be conducted:
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns school district investigations and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
